mapper.sql: version_id, object_id, version_no, storage_backend, storage_bucket, storage_key, status, file_name, content_type, content_length, checksum_sha256, etag, cache_control, content_disposition, source_object_id, variant_type, created_at, activated_at, expired_at, purged_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_object_version () values (#{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionNo}, #{storageBackend}, #{storageBucket}, #{storageKey}, #{status}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{contentLength}, #{checksumSha256}, #{etag}, #{cacheControl}, #{contentDisposition}, #{sourceObjectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{variantType}, #{createdAt}, #{activatedAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{purgedAt}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), storage_bucket = values(storage_bucket), storage_key = values(storage_key), etag = values(etag), cache_control = values(cache_control), content_disposition = values(content_disposition), activated_at = values(activated_at), expired_at = values(expired_at), purged_at = values(purged_at)
